summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Prime Digital is a Glasgow-based digital marketing agency specializing in SEO, PPC (Paid Search), and Web Design, helping service businesses in the UK and US generate leads and growth through data-driven strategies. With over 12 years of experience and £5M+ in managed ad spend, they focus on building predictable customer acquisition systems backed by strategy, data, and continuous optimization.

---
